<Parameter> <Id>Text</Id> <Alias /> <Nameless>true</Nameless> <Required>true</Required> <Localizable>true</Localizable> <ValueContainerType>Single</ValueContainerType> <ValueType>String</ValueType> </Parameter> <Parameter> <Id>PrinterId</Id> <Alias>printer</Alias> <Nameless>false</Nameless> <Required>false</Required> <Localizable>false</Localizable> <ValueContainerType>Single</ValueContainerType> <ValueType>String</ValueType> <ValueContext> <Type>Actor</Type> <SubType>TextPrinters</SubType> </ValueContext> </Parameter> <Parameter> <Id>AuthorId</Id> <Alias>author</Alias> <Nameless>false</Nameless> <Required>false</Required> <Localizable>false</Localizable> <ValueContainerType>Single</ValueContainerType> <ValueType>String</ValueType> <ValueContext> <Type>Actor</Type> <SubType>Characters</SubType> </ValueContext> </Parameter> <Parameter> <Id>RevealSpeed</Id> <Alias>speed</Alias> <Nameless>false</Nameless> <Required>false</Required> <Localizable>false</Localizable> <ValueContainerType>Single</ValueContainerType> <ValueType>Decimal</ValueType> <DefaultValue>1</DefaultValue>
